title: Work and Health Programme statistics to November 2024
body: " The latest release of these statistics can be found in the Work and Health Programme statistics collection.   The Work and Health Programme (WHP) helps disabled people, as well as the long-term unemployed and certain other priority groups (known as early access groups) to enter into and stay in work.  The WHP statistics cover 6 different measures:   Referrals Individuals referred Starts First earnings from employment Job outcomes Performance expectations   Further information  Read the background information and methodology note for more information about the WHP statistics.  "
